title: Image To Image Xiaohongshu Food Cover Photo Edit
sourceTitle: Image To Image Xiaohongshu Food Cover Photo Edit AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Image-to-image Xiaohongshu food-cover edit for an uploaded fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish with concrete medium cues from the prompt, preserving 保留原来的食物类型和主要内容，。 while making the photo brighter, cleaner, and more appetizing. Subject: 保留原来的食物类型和主要内容，。 remains the same dish and main content from the uploaded photo; only presentation quality, composition, lighting, color, steam, texture, and subtle cover polish are improved. Scene: Original tabletop or dining environment is cleaned and refined, with messy background softly blurred or organized, food texture emphasized, and a clean upper area reserved for later Chinese cover title. Composition: Preserve the original food type and main arrangement, improve crop and balance for a 4:5 Xiaohongshu cover, keep the food dominant, leave a clean top title zone, and add only small atmosphere accents around the food. Signature Elements: Uploaded fixed source visual style, lighting, and render finish with concrete medium cues from the prompt, preserved 保留原来的食物类型和主要内容，。, improved food texture, clean top title space for later Chinese cover title, subtle background blur, small white Xiaohongshu-style hand-drawn decorations, and appetizing 4:5 cover crop. Fixed source details: Source Food Photo: ordinary home-cooked noodle bowl photo. Style: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Color Palette: Keep the original food colors recognizable while enhancing fresh highlights, warm appetizing tones, clean whites, soft tabletop neutrals, and subtle white doodle accents. Lighting: Improve soft natural light, brighten the food surface, add gentle steam or gloss detail when suitable, reduce harsh shadows, and keep the result believable rather than artificial. Typography: the top area stays clean for later user-added title, and small white hand-drawn stars, hearts, short emphasis lines, and food-side accent strokes remain decorative marks only, not words. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
